LAW AND MOTION, 301, PLAINTIFF MCCORMACK BARON RAGAN MANAGEMENT SERVICES INCORPORATED'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS DENIED. DEFENDANT HAS RAISED A TRIABLE ISSUE OF MATERIAL FACT AS TO WHETHER LANDERS WAS A HOUSEHOLD MEMBER OR GUEST WITHIN THE MEANING OF THE LEASE. ORDER WAS SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR# 8189
